name: Snowflo
dialogue: The arch behind me hums with old cold.
I am the first half of the seal. Beat me — and Snowpro still stands.
But you have to start somewhere.
preBattleLine: Snowflo plants her feet. Frost crawls up the walls behind her.
postDefeatDialogue: Half the seal cracks. You feel it more than you see it.
My elder waits ahead. Bring everything you have left.
